title: IEEE Rwanda Subsection Launch & Societies Engagement Forum
description: Official launch of the IEEE Rwanda Subsection, the first IEEE geographic unit in Rwanda, supported by IEEE Smart Cities, the IEEE Africa Council, and IEEE Region 8, with engagement sessions for IEEE societies including MTT-S.

title: Joint Technical Session with the IEEE ComSoc Kerala Chapter
description: Joint session hosted by our chapter under ComSoc's Twin Chapter Program. Talks: “The Future of Spectrum Sovereignty” by Dr. Edwin Mugume (CMU-Africa) and “Digital Battlefield: Radar Communication and Sensor Fusion in Contemporary Fighter Aircrafts” by Krishna Priya Boban (IEEE ComSoc Kerala).
